creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 160964
Clang error output test files for this case.

Trying to execute a limited buildworld via an external toolchain (svn co of clang head).

I'm hitting an assertion in clang regarding out MIPSIII target that is used (which is not the default for clang).

--------------------------------------------------------------
>>> stage 4.2: building libraries
--------------------------------------------------------------
===> gnu/lib/libssp/libssp_nonshared (obj,depend,all,install)
===> gnu/lib/libgcc (obj,depend,all,install)
===> lib/libcompiler_rt (obj,depend,all,install)
Assertion failed: (((!isGP64bit() && (isABI_O32() || isABI_EABI())) || (isGP64bit() && (isABI_N32() || isABI_N64()))) && "Invalid  Arch & ABI pair."), function MipsSubtarget, file /home/sbruno/clang/llvm/lib/Target/Mips/MipsSubtarget.cpp, line 94.
clang-3.8: error: unable to execute command: Abort trap (core dumped)
clang-3.8: error: clang frontend command failed due to signal (use -v to see invocation)
clang version 3.8.0 (trunk 247514)
Target: mips-unknown-freebsd11.0
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /home/sbruno/clang/build/bin
clang-3.8: note: diagnostic msg: PLEASE submit a bug report to http://llvm.org/bugs/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
clang-3.8: note: diagnostic msg: 
********************

PLEASE ATTACH THE FOLLOWING FILES TO THE BUG REPORT:
Preprocessed source(s) and associated run script(s) are located at:
clang-3.8: note: diagnostic msg: /tmp/ssp-local-2bb599.c
clang-3.8: note: diagnostic msg: /tmp/ssp-local-2bb599.sh
clang-3.8: note: diagnostic msg: 

********************
--- ssp-local.o ---
*** [ssp-local.o] Error code 254
